backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining diagram state types (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels) and user profiles, with storage using Map structures and access control via MixinAuthorization and MixinStorage for save/load/delete operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: adding a user icon to the attack path visualizer toolbar and replacing the computer icon with a single image, both with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including App.tsx (authentication and routing), AttackPathPage (visualization with save/load), AttackPathToolbar (draggable icons including user icon), AttackPathIcon (icon rendering with 128x128 assets), and AttackPathCanvas (interactive canvas with transform tools).
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes with security-focused dark blue/teal palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Threat Hunting Report Portal application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication, profile setup modal, and routes for report list, create, detail, and attack path pages, all protected behind login.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component handling icon placement with drag/drop/resize, connections, drawing modes (freehand/line/arrow), text labels with rotation/resize, eraser functionality, and free transform tool with visual handles for moving and resizing elements.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG connector component rendering arrow lines between icons with calculated angles, shortened endpoints to avoid overlap, and click handlers for deletion.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Reusable icon component with dynamic width/height props, mapping IconType to image assets (including user and computer icons at 128x128), and built-in drag-and-drop functionality for toolbar placement.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Toolbar component for attack path diagram editor providing draggable icon types (user, email, attacker, computer, etc.), drawing tools (freehand, line, arrow, text), and action buttons (undo, save, load, export, clear) with color picker for text.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation (Reports, Attack Path, New Report), user profile display, login button, hero banner on homepage, and footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Dialog component for loading saved attack path diagrams, displaying list of diagrams with metadata (icon count, connections, last modified date) and delete functionality with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Logout button component that clears Internet Identity authentication and query cache; only renders when user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen with Internet Identity authentication, displaying security messaging and login button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable dropdown component for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from predefined data, with support for adding custom techniques and displaying selected items as removable badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that generates and opens a print dialog for PDF export of threat hunt reports, with loading state and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup requiring name input, non-dismissible until profile is created.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating incident reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations. Includes dynamic array fields with add/remove functionality and form validation.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component for saving attack path diagrams with a name input field. Handles save/cancel actions and displays loading state during save operations.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Defines the MitreTechnique interface and exports a comprehensive array of MITRE ATT&CK techniques covering Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation tactics with IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors. Initializes access control with admin token and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Custom hook managing state for attack path diagrams including placed icons, connections, drawings, text labels, and drawing tools. Provides undo functionality with history management and methods to add/remove/modify diagram elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: Custom React Query mutation hook for deleting diagram states by ID. Invalidates the 'allDiagrams' query cache on successful deletion.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: Custom React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend actor. Enabled only when the actor is available and not fetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Custom React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend. Returns extended query state that properly reflects actor dependency and loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: Custom React Query hook that fetches a specific diagram state by ID from the backend actor. Enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing user login/logout with the DFINITY Internet Identity service. Includes AuthClient creation, identity management, login status tracking, and a provider component for wrapping the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get all, get by ID, save, delete) with a locally defined DetailedReport type. All backend methods are stubbed out and disabled since the backend no longer supports these operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Provides a React Query mutation hook to save the current user's profile via the actor's saveCallerUserProfile method, invalidating the currentUserProfile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: Provides a React Query mutation hook to save diagram state (name and DiagramState object) via the actor, invalidating both diagramState and allDiagrams queries on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart elements.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Renders an interactive attack path diagram editor with toolbar controls for placing icons, drawing connections, freehand drawing, and managing diagram state (save, load, clear, undo).
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Provides a form page for creating new threat hunt reports with fields for metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, and recommendations, using the useSaveReport hook.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays a detailed view of a single threat hunt report including executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and findings with PDF download capability.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: Displays a table of all threat hunting reports with columns for title, author, date, technique count, and IOC count, plus actions for viewing, downloading as PDF, and deleting reports.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: TypeScript declaration file for jsPDF library types (file appears to be empty or contains only type declarations).
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates printable PDF reports from threat hunt data by creating an HTML document in a new window with styled sections for metadata, threat actors, MITRE ATT&CK techniques, IOCs, and findings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, extended theme properties including sidebar colors, custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features for a MITRE ATT&CK-based threat hunting report portal, including report forms, technique selection, PDF generation, report listing, and custom styling requirements.
